headlines.description: Joe Mixon ran for 151 yards and two touchdowns and caught Joe Burrow's pass for another score as the Cincinnati Bengals rolled up 505 yards to beat the Jacksonville Jaguars 33-25 Sunday for their first win of the season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mixon's 3 TDs pace Bengals in 33-25 win over Jaguars

headlines.description: Baker Mayfield and Myles Garrett each had a homecoming gift waiting when Cleveland visited Dallas in their home state Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mayfield, Garrett right at home as Browns beat Cowboys 49-38

events.name: New Orleans Saints at Detroit Lions

headlines.description: Drew Brees threw two touchdown passes to Tre'Quan Smith 2:19 apart in the second quarter, helping the short-handed New Orleans Saints overcome a 14-point deficit and beat the Detroit Lions 35-29 Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Saints score 5 straight TDs in 35-29 win over Lions

headlines.description: Russell Wilson threw for 360 yards and two touchdowns, and the Seattle Seahawks improved to 4-0 on the season by beating the Miami Dolphins 31-23 Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wilson leads Seahawks to first 4-0 start since 2013

events.name: Los Angeles Chargers at Tampa Bay Buccaneers

headlines.description: Tom Brady threw for 369 yards and five touchdowns, all to different receivers, helping the Tampa Bay Buccaneers rally from a 17-point deficit Sunday to beat the Los Angeles Chargers 38-31 for their third straight victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brady throws for 5 TDs, Bucs rally to beat Chargers 38-31

headlines.description: Lamar Jackson ran for a 50-yard touchdown and threw for two scores in a bounce-back performance by the reigning NFL MVP and the Baltimore Ravens, who took control early against Washington in a 31-17 victory Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jackson shows MVP form to help Ravens beat Washington 31-17

headlines.description: Teddy Bridgewater threw for 276 yards and two touchdowns, ran for his first score since a devastating knee injury in 2016, and the Carolina Panthers solved their red zone woes in a 31-21 win over the Arizona Cardinals on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bridgewater, Panthers fix red-zone woes, top Cardinals 31-21

headlines.description: Dalvin Cook ran for 130 yards and two touchdowns and the Minnesota Vikings withstood a late rally from the winless Houston Texans to get their first victory on Sunday, 31-23.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cook has 2 TDs as Vikings get 1st win, 31-23 over Texans

events.name: New York Giants at Los Angeles Rams

headlines.description: Jared Goff hit Cooper Kupp for a 55-yard touchdown with 6:56 to play, and the Los Angeles Rams grinded out a 17-9 victory over the New York Giants on Sunday in a game marred by a postgame fight between Rams cornerback Jalen Ramsey and Giants receiver...
headlines.shortLinkText: Rams hold off Giants 17-9; Ramsey, Tate fight after game

headlines.description: — Houston coach Lovie Smith kept insisting his team would play for the win Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Texans rally for 32-31 win at Indy but lose top draft pick

events.name: Buffalo Bills at Las Vegas Raiders

headlines.description: Shaking off a banged-up left shoulder, Josh Allen threw for two touchdowns and rushed for another, leading the Buffalo Bills to a 30-23 victory over the Las Vegas Raiders on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bills remain undefeated, top Raiders in Las Vegas, 30-23

headlines.description: Carson Wentz hit Travis Fulgham on a 42-yard touchdown pass  with 5:50 remaining to lift the Philadelphia Eagles to their first win of the season, 25-20 over the San Francisco 49ers on Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wentz rallies Eagles to 1st win of season, 25-20 over 49ers
